_note: Profile-keyed risk thresholds. v2 long-only. Source: agent-risk.md §3-4. Profile is auto-detected from signal.horizon_seconds: <=7200s scalper, >=86400s swing, else intraday.
_position_size_note: max_position_pct_capital is 1.0 (full capital deployable) because Elder's 1% risk-per-trade with 1% stops forces position size ≈ capital — capping at 2% was mathematically impossible. The absolute $500 USD cap (global.max_position_size_usd_cap) is what actually bounds notional risk.
_min_stop_note: min_stop_pct floors stops at noise level for each profile. Scalpers run tighter (50bps) than swing (30bps) by design — using one global floor would either reject every scalper or let unsafe swings through.
